org.docgene.model

Class XMLDisambArticle.Element

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.docgene.model.XMLDisambArticle.Element
  • Enclosing class:
    XMLDisambArticle

    public static class XMLDisambArticle.Element
extends java.lang.Object
    A disambiguation element points to an article which will be presented in the list of disambiguated articles.
    Since:
    0.46
